title: Slack - Monday.com integration
excerpt: I have set up the integration between Slack and Monday.com. My Slack messages are flowing into Monday.com. I was wondering if there’s a way to also include a link to my Slack messages when I create a new item on Monday.c…

posts.author: skwilder (Scott Wilder)
posts.cookedHtml: I have set up the integration between Slack and Monday.com. My Slack messages are flowing into Monday.com. I was wondering if there’s a way to also include a link to my Slack messages when I create a new item on Monday.com. Thoughts?
